meta.description: Test cases for the model-aliases system. Verifies that /team and /delegate read shared/model-aliases.json for alias resolution, /update-models fetches from the Firebase API and writes the file, CLAUDE.md enforcement prevents hallucinated model IDs, and unknown-alias handling directs users to available aliases or /update-models.
meta.notes: v2.0.0: Strengthened alias resolution checks to verify EXACT model IDs from file (TC-01, TC-02). Replaced missing-file test with unknown-alias handling test (TC-05). Replaced weak team-defaults test with file-sourced defaults check (TC-06). Added stale-model regression test (TC-09). New checks: mcp_team_models_exact_from_file, mcp_create_session_model_exact_from_file, response_mentions_available_aliases, no_invented_model_id, model_not_stale, reads_model_aliases_file_or_prefs.

test_cases.description: Alias 'grok' must resolve to the EXACT model ID from shared/model-aliases.json shortAliases, not a stale or guessed ID
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Quick check: does CLAUDE.md mention model selection rules?

test_cases.description: Alias 'gemini' via /delegate must resolve to the EXACT model ID from shared/model-aliases.json shortAliases
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:delegate gemini /dev:research what is the model-aliases system

test_cases.description: When asked to use a model, Claude should not add provider prefixes or invent model IDs from training data
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory List files in shared/ directory

test_cases.description: /update-models should fetch from the Firebase queryPluginDefaults endpoint and read the existing file
When user provides an alias not in shortAliases (e.g., 'llama'), Claude should list available aliases or suggest /update-models. Test catches both correct refusal and hallucinated model IDs.
When /team runs, task prompts should not contain hardcoded model default lists from old implementations
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models internal --no-memory Review the README structure and formatting

test_cases.description: When user specifies --models with a full model ID (not a short alias), it should be passed verbatim without modification or prefix addition
When asked about available models for multi-model review, Claude should Read shared/model-aliases.json rather than listing models from training knowledge
test_cases.prompt: What external AI models can I use with /team for code review? List the available models.

test_cases.description: When alias 'grok' resolves, the result must NOT be a known stale model ID (e.g. grok-code-fast-1 which was the old default). Must match the current value from model-aliases.json
test_cases.prompt: /multimodel:team --models grok --no-memory Quick check on plugin versions
